description_long: This object is a religious doll or figurine displayed within an ornate, arched alcove or shrine. The doll is dressed in a long, dark green or black robe with gold trim, and a white veil covers its head and shoulders. The figure stands on a golden pedestal adorned with decorative elements, and the alcove itself features intricate gold detailing along the arch and base. The doll's face is pale, with delicate features, and it wears a golden crown or headdress. The back and sides of the alcove are plain and unadorned, contrasting with the richly decorated front. The overall appearance suggests a ceremonial or devotional context, possibly representing a saint or religious icon.
description: A religious doll in a gold-trimmed robe and crown stands within an ornate arched shrine, set on a decorative golden pedestal.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll in full detail, with its ornate robe, crown, and the decorative alcove arch and pedestal clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the plain, curved back of the alcove and the thin profile of the doll, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_2: Rear view shows the back of the alcove, mostly unadorned, with the back of the doll and pedestal partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlights the plain side of the alcove and the edge of the doll's robe.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll wears a long, dark green or black robe with gold trim, a white veil covering the head and shoulders, and a golden crown or headdress, evoking traditional Catholic or Spanish religious attire.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with arms close to the body, head facing forward, and legs together, in a static, reverent posture.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll's facial expression is neutral, with closed lips, open eyes, and a calm, serene demeanor.
attribute_hair_style: The hair is mostly covered by the white veil, with no distinct hairstyle visible.
